mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_camp WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_duty_assignment WHERE end_time IS NULL AND duty_type IN ('SUPER_ADMIN', 'COURSE_ADMIN', 'ARCHIVE_ADMIN')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_duty_application WHERE status = 0

SELECT a.apply_id AS applyId, u.nickname AS applicantName, a.duty_type AS dutyType, a.create_time AS createTime FROM t_duty_application a LEFT JOIN t_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.status = 0 ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
